Title
Entry Level Back End Developer

Responsibilities

• Develop backend applications and services.
• Design and implement REST APIs.
• Build scalable server-side applications.
• Work with databases and client-server architectures.
• Collaborate with engineering teams using Agile methodologies.
• Support cloud-based application development.

Minimum Qualifications

• Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field.
• Basic knowledge of software development concepts.
• Experience with one or more of the following:
  - Java
  - Python
  - C
  - C++
  - SQL
• Familiarity with REST APIs.
• Knowledge of Git and DevOps tools.
• Understanding of Linux or other operating systems.
• Understanding of databases.
• Ability to learn new technologies quickly.
• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

Preferred Qualifications

• One year of software development experience.
• Experience building APIs.
• Experience with cloud platforms.
• Familiarity with virtualization technologies.
• Experience with JSON and Web Services.
